mapper.select: /** UsptCheckoutReqDao.selectList */ select checkout_req_id ,mvn_id ,checkout_req_dt ,checkout_plan_day ,checkout_req_st ,checkout_req_st_dt ,mvn_checkout_yn from uspt_checkout_req where checkout_req_st = 'APRV' and mvn_checkout_yn = false and to_timestamp(checkout_plan_day, 'YYYYMMDD') < now()
